name: solution-architecture-diagram-skill
author: Arvind Radhakrishnen
description: Generate PNG and editable Draw.io solution architecture diagrams from text and optional images, using internal reference layouts and multi-level decomposition with wrapped non-overlapping text.

entrypoints.runner: python run_architecture_skill.py --text "Build a solution architecture diagram for ..." --allow-parallel

inputs.behavior: Accept text or JSON, optionally use images as supporting context, use internal reference architecture layouts, wrap text within boxes, avoid overlap, generate Level 2 capability diagrams when needed, and coordinate sub-agents with shared memory plus parallel-to-sequential fallback.

approvals_needed: Approve or install Agents365 drawio-skill in the target environment
Approve or install draw.io desktop / CLI used by the renderer
Approve the local renderer command template or bridge command
Approve local subprocess execution from the orchestration runner
Approve parallel render jobs if fan-out rendering is desired
